name: poppu-mailroom-wrapper
description: Native (iOS/Android) wrapper for Poppu's Mail Room — Capacitor + direct Google Play Billing (cordova-plugin-purchase, no RevenueCat)

scripts.copy-web: rm -rf www && mkdir www && cp ../index.html ../manifest.json poppu-billing-bridge.js www/ && cp -r ../assets www/assets
scripts.sync: npm run copy-web && npx cap sync
